description.overview: The Welsh Terrier is one of the oldest terrier breeds, resembling a smaller Airedale.
description.temperament: Welsh Terriers are friendly, spirited, and intelligent. They're more easygoing than many terriers.
description.health: Generally healthy. May be prone to eye problems and allergies.
description.exercise: Moderate to high energy. Need daily exercise and play.

verdict.summary: Friendly Welsh terriers that are more easygoing than most. Welsh Terriers are great family dogs with typical terrier spirit.
